description: Wario Land 3 — randomizes all 100 treasure chests.

v.0.1.0.description:
# Update Notes

> **Important:** This build is extremely experimental and requires heavy testing.
> Do not bring this to public syncs yet. This will be the build used exclusively for stability work going forward.

Many of these settings require an active client connection to function, particularly with keysanity.
A more offline-friendly version may come in the future, but for now the client must be connected.

---

## Keysanity

Keys and treasures can now be shuffled amongst each other! This means you can find your Overalls
on your Out of the Woods Grey Key, and any key can appear in a chest. Due to GBC limitations,
the palettes of treasures on keys will differ from their intended colors.

**Please report any bugs you encounter.**

Use the `/keys` command to see your current keys.

### Available Settings

| Setting | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| **Vanilla** | Standard key behavior |
| **Full** | Full keysanity — keys and treasures shuffled together |

> A **Simple** keysanity mode (keys shuffled with keys only) is in progress, but seed generation
> is not yet reliable enough to release.

### Known Issues

- Picking up a key may not register on the first attempt — this appears to be fixed, but monitor for it.
- Treasures on keys may occasionally. Re-entering the level resolves this. (I believe I fixed this too, but let me know if it persists)

---

## Keys Persistence

Keys now persist when leaving a level. This has minimal impact on the vanilla keys setting,
but some levels are notably affected (I'm looking at you Above the Clouds Grey).
---

## Quality of Life Updates

- **Combined items** now display in purple when pulled from chests, making them easier to identify.
  Note: they will not appear purple on "treasure on keys" spots.
- **Action menu replaced with Treasure menu** — No more broken Action Menu! You can now view your collected treasures from within a level by choosing the "Action Menu" button.
- **In-game item messages** — you will now see a message when items are received or sent.
  - Supports up to 3 lines of text
  - Some background text bleed may occur due to hardware limitations; leaving and re-entering the room resets tiles
  - **Known bug:** Re-opening the BizHawk client will re-send all item messages. Use `/skip` to bypass this.
    `/skip` can also be used at any time to suppress received item history (e.g. after a release).
- **Wario palettes** have been split into separate **Overalls** and **Shirt** options.
- Various logic fixes applied; keys and chests now use separate logic tables.
v.0.1.0.title: The BIG One (Keysanity and so much more)

> **Important:** This build is extremely experimental and requires heavy testing.

### Available Settings

| **Vanilla** | Standard key behavior |

v.0.1.0r2.title: The BIG One (Keysanity and so much more)

v0.0.1.description: First release! Please post any issues in the "issues" section (ideally), or let me know in the discord!
v0.0.1.title: Initial Release v0.0.1

v0.0.10.description:
**A few ability fixes!**

- If you heavy ground pound with an item in hand, it should now shake the screen correctly. This was directly affecting the Above the Clouds Blue Chest, making it impossible to get. This has been fixed, and Above the Clouds Blue Chest is no longer forced filler.
- Enemies should no longer fly off the screen as if you had Garlic, unless you have Garlic. This was mostly visual, but let me know if heavy enemies are still having issues with this!

Added High Jump Boots to be required for Forest of Fear Red Chest
 
Still having potential issues with double granting abilities. Please let me know if you're able to recreate this, and the exact ways you recreate it. It seems to not happen every seed?

**MORE PALETTES!**

- More enemies/bosses should have palette swap, and more fun ones!
- Wario may be affected by this too, let me know if it's too crazy.
v0.0.10.title: Ability fix (Above the Clouds Blue Chest issue) and waaaay more palette swaps

v0.0.11.description:
**NEW OPTIONS!**

- Added the option to start with random levels! You can choose up to 8 (default is 0), and it'll start you with that many levels! These are all levels that don't require anything for their Gray Chests. The levels that these are chosen from are: N1 Out of the Woods, W1 Desert Ruins, W2 The Volcano's Base, S3 Tower of Revival, S4 The Steep Canyon, S6 Above the Clouds, E1 The Stagnant Swamp, E2 The Frigid Sea, E7 Forest of Fear. 
- To help determine what you have locked from the beginning, a command will run that will list out your unlocked levels. You can also use this during your seed to find out what levels you have unlocked by using the "/levels" command.

_Tired of typing "Progressive" before hinting your Progressive item? Me too!_ 
- I added the option to just type in "grab", "flippers", or "overalls" when hinting, and it'll work, too. For using "!getitem", you will still need to type in "Progressive" before these.

**Logic Fixes** 

- Added (Flippers 1 or High Jump) required for Forest of Fear Red Chest (previously only required Garlic).
- Added Progressive Grab to Colossal Hole Red Chest (previously (also) only required Garlic).
- Added Garlic required to The Tidal Coast Green Chest (previously just Statue).
v0.0.11.title: Random Level Starts! (and some more logic fixes).

v0.0.11.2.description:
**_TEST APWORLD, THIS MAY NOT BE BEATABLE. NEEDS TO BE TESTED. TRY "v.0.0.11" if you want a "more stable" build!!_**

Here's an apworld to test if anyone wants to try seeing if you're still sent a Tier 2 item first or double abilities (i.e. 2 Overalls when you should have only 1). I haven't fully tested this, so it could fully break, but wanted to get this out here to test!

I've changed how the ROM and Client see progressive items, and it _should_ always get tier 1, and progress after. I'm not if it'll always show tier 1 when picking up the item in game or not, literally put this together tonight.
v0.0.11.2.title: Another Ability Fix Attempt

v0.0.11.3.description:
**THIS SHOULD BE WORKING! Needs  more testing, as always, but the progressive abilities should be working as intended now!**

Another attempt at fixing abilities. 

Solo offline seeds seem to be working fine besides needing the initial connection for any extra non-axe items. (You'll just need to connect once to receive them).

Online solo seeds seem to also be working. You are only granted items from your own world when you are not in the treasure cutscene. So "send_location" or "!getitem", specifically for progressive abilities, must either be done in level, or enter a level after sending it. You should receive the item.

As far as I can tell, receiving an item from another game shouldn't give you double progressives anymore, but this needs to be tested more. I was really only able to test this by imitating sending a location from another world that had my progression, but it immediately caught it and gave me the correct progressive ability. So... here's to hoping.

Also fixed logic for Castle of Illusions Blue Chest (now requires overalls additionally).
v0.0.11.3.title: Third TIme's the Charm?

v0.0.2.description:
**Logic Fixes (the Green Chest fixes)**

- Steep Canyon Green Chest: Needs 2 Progressive Flippers.
- The Colossal Hole Green Chest:  added "or High Jump", so either Flute or High Jump will be in logic.
- The Big Bridge Green Chest: Needs Overalls Tier 1 as well.
v0.0.2.title: Logic Hotfix

v0.0.3.description: Whoops! Adding "Start with Magnifying Glass" as an option made 5 Music Boxes always required. If you're on an old apworld, you can just cheat them in with "!getitem". Is confirmed working now!
v0.0.3.title: Music Boxes Bugfix

v0.0.4.description:
Forced filler on: 

Pool of Rain Red Chest and Blue Chest (having issues getting the variants to patch correctly).

A Town in Chaos Blue Chest (mechanical fan is not working).

I will try to get these working, but just so it's still playable, here's a fix.
v0.0.4.title: The bugs are here!

v0.0.5.description:
Electric Fan Propeller has now been fixed! Blue chest for A Town in Chaos is now back in logic and not forced filler. 

Pool of Rain is still causing issues, those two chests are still causing issues.

There was an issue with no requirement levels (levels that don't require anything for early variants) silently failing, so this may have fixed a few other issues we haven't run into. It also could have broke some... so testing is needed!
v0.0.5.title: Electric Fan Propeller Fix

v0.0.6.description:
**Bug fixes:**
- Pool of Rain should now be fixed (glass jar raised with only air pump and stalk is visible and climbable with only magic seeds). Red Chest and Blue Chest are now back logic and not forced filler.
- Updated 3 levels to be more uniform with how other level patching is. 
- Added "needs grab 1 and fire drencher" for The East Crater Red, previously expected you needed nothing

I'll be working on making a readable sheet with current logic, so we can check it together and come up with what we consider "Standard" logic. This will be the only logic for a while, we can revisit this once the game feels more stable.

I'll also be working on a "known bugs" list, which will differ slightly from the "known quirks" (these are more game breaking bugs than visual bugs). 

Please report any bugs to Issues (going forward, I think this will be the ideal way to report), or to the Discord! Either way works, let's find these bugs!
v0.0.6.title: Bug fixes and various patching

v0.0.7.description:
**Logic fixes (shout out everyone continuing to find these so quick!)**
- Added Flippers tier 2 to Beneath the Waves Red
- Added High Jump Boots required for Beneath the Waves Green and Blue
- Removed Flippers from requirement on Grasslands Blue Chest
- Added "Sun Medallion or Flippers tier 1" for Frigid Sea Blue
- Added "Grab tier 1" for Castle of Illusion Gray (all chests at least require Grab 1 in Castle now)
- Added "Overalls tier 2 or High Jump Boots" for Castle of Illusion Red
- Added "Grab tier 2" for Castle of Illusion Green
- Added "Overalls tier 2" for A Town in Chaos Green
- Castle of Illusion Red logic is now: ((Grab x1 + Sun Medallion Top + Sun Medallion Bottom) OR Grab x2) + (Overalls x2 OR High Jump Boots)
v0.0.7.title: MORE Logic fixes! (3 releases in a day oops)

v0.0.8.description: HUUUUGE shoutout to @snackerfork for the new sprite for AP items! (Red = Progression, Blue = Useful, Green = Filler) **The Bizhawk update!** Turns out, I was running this on 2.9 instead of 2.11... whoops! This runs fine on Bizhawk 2.11 [](https://github.com/TASEmulators/BizHawk/releases/tag/2.11). I'll be adding instruction on how to use Bizhawk with this and deprecating the mGBA setup out. If you've previously installed the wl3 apworld, you will need to (most likely) delete out your wl3 options in your host.yaml (you can find this in your main Archipelago folder). Delete the whole "wl3_options" section: Also, under host.yaml, make sure you have this section filled out correctly with the location of your Emuhawk.exe location: After this, it should auto-open the patched game, the lua and the Bizhawk Client, making it MUCH easier to get seeds up and running! Let me know if there are any issues! Thanks for testing!!
v0.0.8.title: THE BIZHAWK UPDATE and NEW AP SPRITE!

v0.0.9.description: Hi! Added an option to palette swap Wario as well (let me know if it's too crazy, I can always tone down how much the hue has shifted). Above the Clouds Blue Chest has been forced to be filler for now. I'm trying to refactor the abilities so they work a little more smoothly, but so far, this should be the only area you can't access with how the abilities currently work. I'll be working on an abilities fix this weekend, but can't guarantee I will finish. For now, game isn't too broken to play, but I'd still be mindful that there maybe some issues yet to be found.
v0.0.9.title: Wario palette swap! (Above the Clouds Blue forced filler)

v0.2.0.description:
## Changelog

### Bug Fixes

**Omodon graphical glitch**
Fixed the weird Omodon enemy issue, where when he was lifted his sprite exploded. He is now back to normal.

**Restored Bird in N1**
Bird has been reinstated in N1. Say goodbye to the Hammerbot in N1, they'll be back in enemizer!

**Grab + jumping bug**
Jumping while grabbing was automatically acting as if you had high jump boots. This has now been restored to normal jump if high jump boots aren't acquired.

**Magnifying glass offset**
Starting with mag glass offset was changed and not working. It's now working.

**Start with Axe offset**
Same class of issue as above, corrected offset (this was working, but still needed to be adjusted regardless). 

**Golf out-of-bounds fix**
Fixed the out of bounds glitch in Golf where the paragoomba would get stuck. Now floats back to your last position.

**Garlic + uncracked block**
Tier 1 overalls can no longer break uncracked blocks from above when you have Overalls 1 + Garlic. This was an unintended bug.

**Lead overalls landing**
This has been corrected. Overalls 1 & 2 both have the correct sound associated with them now.

**Potential bug fix for disappearing treasures**
Hopefully fixed this bug. Needs more testing to confirm, but did not see anything missing. I believe this issue was either due to no safeguard in place, or potentially related to the Omodon graphical issue as well (framesets were accidentally moved when key as treasures was implemented). Please let me know if you run into this bug!

---

### New Apworld Options

**I Hate Golf**
Auto-wins the golf mini-game on entry. You're welcome. DO NOT USE THIS IN THE GOLF BUILDING. IT IS BUGGED.

**Reduce Flashing**
Disables palette cycling in flashing rooms for those with photosensitivity . Enabled automatically when background palette shuffles are active.

**New Palette Options**
You can now change your background palette. Simple is a little less aggressive with the hue shift, full will show a stronger difference. Both can be a bit jarring in some levels. The flashing rooms are automatically off with this setting due to how jarring it can be.

---

This is an unstable build that needs to be tested. Once this has been more thoroughly tested, I will update this message (as stable). 

Please report any bugs you see!

###
v0.2.0.title: LOTS of bugfixes, and some new QoL cosmetics settings

v0.3.0.description:
# WL3 Archipelago — `new-updates` Release

## Highlights

- **Transformation Shuffle** — 11 transformations shuffled into the item pool as progression items. They are notated by certain filler items (see below) (full logic incorporated by @LizzieTwoShoes)
- **Trap items** — Fire, Yarn, Bouncy, Electric, and Ice Skate traps in-level
- **Non-Stop Chests** — stay inside the level after collecting a treasure instead of going to the clear screen
- **Combined Items** — new Choice option: off / overworld / in-level / both
- **Difficulty options** (written by @LizzieTwoShoes)
- **Palette shuffle legal cleanup** — changed the backend with palette shuffle, now much cleaner

---

## New Option: Transformation Shuffle

When enabled, 12 Form items (11 transformations, Vampire as progressive ×2) are placed into the pool as progression items. You cannot use any transformation until you find its Form (this does not affect enemies that transform you). When disabled, Select + D-Pad behave normally — no transformations are player-activated. To help notate these, 12 filler-tier treasures are removed; each Form appears in chests as its sacrificed treasure's icon.

### Controls

Hold **Select** + a button or dpad direction to activate an unlocked transformation.
**Select + Start** toggles between Page 1 and Page 2 (will play a jingle)
Press **Select again while transformed** to cancel and return to normal Wario.

### Page 1

| Input | Transformation | Logical Implications | Replaced Treasure |
|-------|----------------|-------------------|------------|
| Select + ⬆ | **Puffy Wario** — float slowly up | High Jump Boots / Bat / Bouncy | Locomotive |
| Select + ⬇ | **Flat Wario** — squish through narrow gaps | *(niche — narrow passage access)* | Fighter Mannequin |
| Select + ⬅ | **Zombie Wario** — phase through single tile platforms | Several specific spots | Saber |
| Select + ➡ | **Vampire Wario** (Progressive; 1st = Vampire, 2nd = Bat) | (Bat) High Jump Boots / Bouncy / Puffy | Crown + UFO |
| Select + Ⓐ | **Fat Wario** — break floors below, slow fall | Overalls T1 / T2 (block break) | Pocket Pet |
| Select + Ⓑ | **Fire Wario** — run uncontrollably, melt ice | Fire Drencher (can go through flames) | Rocket |

### Page 2

| Input | Transformation | Logical Implications | Sacrifices |
|-------|----------------|-------------------|------------|
| Select + ⬆ | **Bouncy Wario** — bounce off walls and floors | High Jump Boots / Puffy / Bat | Goblet |
| Select + ⬇ | **Snowman Wario** — roll downhill, crush obstacles | Several specific spots | Earthen Figure |
| Select + ⬅ | **Yarn Wario** (Ball-O-String) — spin on yarn pulleys | Several specific spots | Teapot |
| Select + ➡ | **Invisible Wario** — pass through certain enemies | *(niche — enemy-gate bypass)* | Telephone |
| Select + Ⓐ | *(empty)* | — | — |
| Select + Ⓑ | **Ice Skatin' Wario** — slide across ice | Several specific spots | Minicar |

### Progressive Vampire

Vampire Form comes in **2 copies** in the pool. Both chests display the Crown icon.

- **1st copy received**: unlocks Vampire (Select + ➡)
- **2nd copy received**: unlocks Bat sub-form — while you're a Vampire, press **Ⓑ** to turn into a bat and fly

Enemy bat bites still turn you directly into a bat for level navigation, regardless of your unlock state. The player-controlled B → Bat gate only applies to the Select-triggered Vampire form.



---

## New Option: Non-Stop Chests

When enabled, collecting a treasure chest inside a level no longer exits to the clear screen. The treasure is marked collected, a short jingle plays, Wario poses briefly, and gameplay continues so you can grab keys/more chests without breaking flow. 

## New Option: Combined Items

Replaces the old **Combined Level Unlocks** toggle with a 4-way choice:

| Value | Behavior |
|-------|----------|
| Off | Every treasure is its own item (vanilla pool) |
| Overworld | Combines overworld-gating pairs (Lantern + Magical Flame, Gears, Skull Rings, etc.) |
| In-Level | Combines in-level pairs (Storm Pouch, Chemicals, Glass Eyes, Golden Eyes, Sun Medallion, Key Cards) |
| Both | Both sets combined |

## Trap Fill

Fire, Yarn, Bouncy, Electric, and Ice Skatin' traps will be added to the pool. These will load on level entry if you receive one in the overworld.

You can choose by percentage how many filler items you want replaced by traps.

---

## Palette Shuffle Cleanup

- Cleaned up how palette swap was achieved. 

---

## Credits

- @LizzieTwoShoes  — Difficulty options, transformation logic pass (`#5`, `#13`)
v0.3.0.title: Another HUGE  Update with tons of QoL and new shuffles

- **Trap items** — Fire, Yarn, Bouncy, Electric, and Ice Skate traps in-level
- **Non-Stop Chests** — stay inside the level after collecting a treasure instead of going to the clear screen
- **Combined Items** — new Choice option: off / overworld / in-level / both
- **Difficulty options** (written by @LizzieTwoShoes)
- **Palette shuffle legal cleanup** — changed the backend with palette shuffle, now much cleaner

---

## New Option: Transformation Shuffle

When enabled, 12 Form items (11 transformations, Vampire as progressive ×2) are placed into the pool as progression items. You cannot use any transformation until you find its Form (this does not affect enemies that transform you). When disabled, Select + D-Pad behave normally — no transformations are player-activated. To help notate these, 12 filler-tier treasures are removed; each Form appears in chests as its sacrificed treasure's icon.

### Controls

Hold **Select** + a button or dpad direction to activate an unlocked transformation.
**Select + Start** toggles between Page 1 and Page 2 (will play a jingle)
Press **Select again while transformed** to cancel and return to normal Wario.

### Page 1

| Input | Transformation | Logical Implications | Replaced Treasure |
|-------|----------------|-------------------|------------|
| Select + ⬆ | **Puffy Wario** — float slowly up | High Jump Boots / Bat / Bouncy | Locomotive |
| Select + ⬇ | **Flat Wario** — squish through narrow gaps | *(niche — narrow passage access)* | Fighter Mannequin |
| Select + ⬅ | **Zombie Wario** — phase through single tile platforms | Several specific spots | Saber |
| Select + ➡ | **Vampire Wario** (Progressive; 1st = Vampire, 2nd = Bat) | (Bat) High Jump Boots / Bouncy / Puffy | Crown + UFO |
| Select + Ⓐ | **Fat Wario** — break floors below, slow fall | Overalls T1 / T2 (block break) | Pocket Pet |
| Select + Ⓑ | **Fire Wario** — run uncontrollably, melt ice | Fire Drencher (can go through flames) | Rocket |

### Page 2

| Input | Transformation | Logical Implications | Sacrifices |
|-------|----------------|-------------------|------------|
| Select + ⬆ | **Bouncy Wario** — bounce off walls and floors | High Jump Boots / Puffy / Bat | Goblet |
| Select + ⬇ | **Snowman Wario** — roll downhill, crush obstacles | Several specific spots | Earthen Figure |
| Select + ⬅ | **Yarn Wario** (Ball-O-String) — spin on yarn pulleys | Several specific spots | Teapot |
| Select + ➡ | **Invisible Wario** — pass through certain enemies | *(niche — enemy-gate bypass)* | Telephone |
| Select + Ⓐ | *(empty)* | — | — |
| Select + Ⓑ | **Ice Skatin' Wario** — slide across ice | Several specific spots | Minicar |

### Progressive Vampire

Vampire Form comes in **2 copies** in the pool. Both chests display the Crown icon.

- **1st copy received**: unlocks Vampire (Select + ➡)
- **2nd copy received**: unlocks Bat sub-form — while you're a Vampire, press **Ⓑ** to turn into a bat and fly

Enemy bat bites still turn you directly into a bat for level navigation, regardless of your unlock state. The player-controlled B → Bat gate only applies to the Select-triggered Vampire form.



---

## New Option: Non-Stop Chests

When enabled, collecting a treasure chest inside a level no longer exits to the clear screen. The treasure is marked collected, a short jingle plays, Wario poses briefly, and gameplay continues so you can grab keys/more chests without breaking flow. 

## New Option: Combined Items

Replaces the old **Combined Level Unlocks** toggle with a 4-way choice:

| Value | Behavior |
|-------|----------|
| Off | Every treasure is its own item (vanilla pool) |
| Overworld | Combines overworld-gating pairs (Lantern + Magical Flame, Gears, Skull Rings, etc.) |
| In-Level | Combines in-level pairs (Storm Pouch, Chemicals, Glass Eyes, Golden Eyes, Sun Medallion, Key Cards) |
| Both | Both sets combined |

## Trap Fill

Fire, Yarn, Bouncy, Electric, and Ice Skatin' traps will be added to the pool. These will load on level entry if you receive one in the overworld.

You can choose by percentage how many filler items you want replaced by traps.

---

## Palette Shuffle Cleanup

- Cleaned up how palette swap was achieved. 

---

## Credits

- @LizzieTwoShoes  — Difficulty options, transformation logic pass (`#5`, `#13`)
v0.3.0r2.title: Another HUGE  Update with tons of QoL and new shuffles

v0.3.1.description:
# Keyring, palettes, and logic

## Features & Changes

- **Keyrings!**
  - The option for keyrings has been implemented (getting grey, red, green and blue key as one item for a level). The AWESOME artwork for this was, once again, done by @snackerfork!

- **Transformation Form Icons**
  - Now uses extracted sprites from users rom for each transformation, instead of junk items. 

- **Treasure Palette Overrides**
  - Treasures on Key and Chest locations should be more accurately colored now. There may still be a few bugs with this (possibly changing a few enemies colors), but is mostly working as intended now!

## Cleanup

- Lots of palette cleanup/fixes

## Logic Bugs/Fixes by the also awesome @LizzieTwoShoes 
- Added High Jump Boots into the requirements for N1 Green Chest and added a "hard tricks" rule without them
- Fixed rule for Desert Ruins Blue Chest, beating the boss without actual Overalls was too finicky
- Fixed rules for Warped Void Blue Key and Chest, Warp Removal Apparatus is required to get around needing the keycards with puffy or bat
- Added a bunch of new ways for A Town in Chaos Green and Blue Keys to be in logic
- Added ways for West Crater Red Key to be in logic with various transformations
- Fixed the Knowledge Check, Hard Trick, and Glitch logic to also include transformations in logic (oops)
- Added Flat and Fat to Beneath the Waves Red Key Knowledge Logic
v0.3.1.title: Keyring update, some palette fixes, and logic fixes
